faq.lockout: Contact the Front Desk. Do not mention Resident Store lockout service.
faq.amenity_guests: Guests may use amenities when accompanied by a resident.
faq.wifi: Wi-Fi is available in public amenity areas.
faq.found_item: Thank you for letting me know. Please drop it off at the Front Desk.
faq.suggestion: Thank you for sharing. Please scroll to the bottom of this page and submit it through the feedback form so Management can review it.
faq.complaint: Please scroll to the bottom of this page and submit it through the feedback form so Management can review it.
faq.send_management_message: Please use the feedback form at the bottom of this website so your message can be submitted to Management.

anonymous_feedback: Yes. You may submit anonymous feedback using the feedback form at the bottom of this website. You can use a placeholder name such as Alex Parker, an email such as anonymous@example.com, and enter 0000 for the unit number.
